```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# WGBS 分析流程 - Step 10: 轨道导出与位点浏览图
# ==============================================================================
# 最后一节把关键结果导出成浏览器轨道，并画几个代表性位点图，方便人工核查和出图。
ensure_step_dirs("result/10_browser/plots/1", "result/10_browser/tables/1", "result/10_browser/tracks/1")

message("⏳ 导出 BigWig 文件用于 IGV 可视化...")
ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()

for(i in seq_along(sample_ids)) {
  sample_obj <- obj.cpg[[i]]
  sample_name <- sample_ids[i]
  export_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(sample_obj$chr)))
  export_main_chr_levels <- mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr = export_has_chr)
  
  # BigWig score 使用 0-1 范围甲基化比例，并在导出前就过滤到主染色体。
  # 这样后续 IGV/Gviz 会更干净，也能避免 scaffold 相关报错。
  gr_export <- GRanges(
    seqnames = sample_obj$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(sample_obj$start, sample_obj$end),
    score = sample_obj$numCs / sample_obj$coverage 
  )
  gr_export <- gr_export[!is.na(score(gr_export))]
  gr_export <- gr_export[
    standardize_chr_style(seqnames(gr_export), target_has_chr = export_has_chr) %in% export_main_chr_levels
  ]
  gr_export <- tryCatch(
    GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(
      gr_export,
      value = intersect(seqlevels(gr_export), export_main_chr_levels),
      pruning.mode = "coarse"
    ),
    error = function(e) gr_export
  )
  
  tryCatch({ seqlengths(gr_export) <- end(range(gr_export)) }, error = function(e) {})
  
  out_file <- paste0("result/10_browser/tracks/1/methylation_", sample_name, ".bw")
  tryCatch({
    export.bw(gr_export, out_file)
    message("   ✅ 已导出: ", out_file)
  }, error = function(e) message("   ❌ 导出失败 ", sample_name, ": ", e$message))
}

```

```{r}
# 1 代表性位点轨道图 (Representative Locus Views)
# ==============================================================================
# 这里只挑代表性强、耦合分数高、且落在主染色体上的基因做 locus view，避免轨道图过散。
message("⏳ 绘制代表性基因位点轨道图...")

quiet_gviz_deprecations <- function(expr) {
  # Gviz / S4Vectors 当前会产生一批重复的 deprecated warning；
  # 这里只静默这类已知噪音，不吞掉真正的绘图错误。
  withCallingHandlers(
    expr,
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_msg <- conditionMessage(w)
      if(grepl("S4Vectors:::anyMissing", warn_msg, fixed = TRUE) ||
         grepl("Use 'anyNA()' instead", warn_msg, fixed = TRUE)) {
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    }
  )
}

old_ucsc_chromosome_names <- getOption("ucscChromosomeNames")
options(ucscChromosomeNames = FALSE)

tryCatch({
if(requireNamespace("Gviz", quietly = TRUE) && exists("gene_centric_long") && nrow(gene_centric_long) > 0) {
  txdb <- load_main_chr_txdb(config$gtf_file)
  
  tryCatch({
    seqlevelsStyle(txdb) <- seqlevelsStyle(dmr_gr)[1]
  }, error = function(e) {})
  
  plot_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(seqnames(dmr_gr))))
  main_chr_levels <- mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr = plot_has_chr)
  txdb <- tryCatch(
    GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(
      txdb,
      value = intersect(seqlevels(txdb), main_chr_levels),
      pruning.mode = "coarse"
    ),
    error = function(e) txdb
  )
  
  representative_genes <- gene_centric_long %>%
    filter(!is.na(geneChr), !is.na(geneStart), !is.na(geneEnd), !is.na(CouplingScore)) %>%
    group_by(gene_id_clean) %>%
    summarise(
      SYMBOL = dplyr::first(SYMBOL[!is.na(SYMBOL) & SYMBOL != ""], default = NA_character_),
      geneChr = as.character(first(geneChr)),
      geneStart = suppressWarnings(min(geneStart, na.rm = TRUE)),
      geneEnd = suppressWarnings(max(geneEnd, na.rm = TRUE)),
      score = max(abs(CouplingScore), na.rm = TRUE),
      dominant_quadrant = names(sort(table(Quadrant), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(SYMBOL = ifelse(is.na(SYMBOL) | SYMBOL == "", gene_id_clean, SYMBOL)) %>%
    mutate(geneChr = standardize_chr_style(geneChr, target_has_chr = plot_has_chr)) %>%
    filter(geneChr %in% main_chr_levels) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score), is.finite(geneStart), is.finite(geneEnd)) %>%
    arrange(desc(score)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 6)
  
  if(nrow(representative_genes) > 0) {
    write_csv(representative_genes, "result/10_browser/tables/1/representative_loci.csv")
    
    combined_pdf <- "result/10_browser/plots/1/representative_loci.pdf"
    cairo_pdf(combined_pdf, width = 12, height = 8)
    
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(representative_genes))) {
      gene_row <- representative_genes[i, ]
      chr_use <- as.character(gene_row$geneChr)
      view_start <- max(1, gene_row$geneStart - config$browser_gene_flank)
      view_end <- gene_row$geneEnd + config$browser_gene_flank
      
      # 每个位点统一展示：样本 BigWig、局部 DMR、附近 CGI 和 gene model。
      dmr_window <- dmr_gr[
        as.character(seqnames(dmr_gr)) == chr_use &
          start(dmr_gr) <= view_end &
          end(dmr_gr) >= view_start
      ]
      dmr_window <- tryCatch(
        GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(dmr_window, value = chr_use, pruning.mode = "coarse"),
        error = function(e) dmr_window
      )
      
      cgi_window <- NULL
      if(exists("gr_all_cgi_context")) {
        cgi_window <- gr_all_cgi_context[
          as.character(seqnames(gr_all_cgi_context)) == chr_use &
            start(gr_all_cgi_context) <= view_end &
            end(gr_all_cgi_context) >= view_start
        ]
        cgi_window <- tryCatch(
          GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(cgi_window, value = chr_use, pruning.mode = "coarse"),
          error = function(e) cgi_window
        )
      }
      
      axis_track <- quiet_gviz_deprecations(GenomeAxisTrack())
      
      bw_tracks <- lapply(seq_along(sample_ids), function(j) {
        bw_file <- paste0("result/10_browser/tracks/1/methylation_", sample_ids[j], ".bw")
        if(!file.exists(bw_file)) return(NULL)
        quiet_gviz_deprecations(DataTrack(
          range = bw_file,
          genome = "mm39",
          chromosome = chr_use,
          name = sample_ids[j],
          type = "histogram",
          fill = ifelse(j %in% config$group1_idx, unname(viz_pal$group[config$group1_name]), unname(viz_pal$group[config$group2_name])),
          col = ifelse(j %in% config$group1_idx, unname(viz_pal$group[config$group1_name]), unname(viz_pal$group[config$group2_name])),
          ylim = c(0, 1)
        ))
      })
      bw_tracks <- bw_tracks[!sapply(bw_tracks, is.null)]
      
      dmr_track <- NULL
      if(length(dmr_window) > 0) {
        dmr_track <- quiet_gviz_deprecations(AnnotationTrack(
          range = dmr_window,
          genome = "mm39",
          chromosome = chr_use,
          name = "DMRs",
          fill = ifelse(mcols(dmr_window)$DMR_type == "Hyper", unname(viz_pal$dmr["Hyper"]), unname(viz_pal$dmr["Hypo"])),
          col = NA,
          shape = "box"
        ))
      }
      
      cgi_track <- NULL
      if(!is.null(cgi_window) && length(cgi_window) > 0) {
        cgi_track <- quiet_gviz_deprecations(AnnotationTrack(
          range = cgi_window,
          genome = "mm39",
          chromosome = chr_use,
          name = "CGI",
          fill = viz_pal$track_cgi,
          col = NA,
          shape = "box"
        ))
      }
      
      gene_track <- tryCatch(
        quiet_gviz_deprecations(GeneRegionTrack(
          txdb,
          genome = "mm39",
          chromosome = chr_use,
          start = view_start,
          end = view_end,
          name = paste0(gene_row$SYMBOL, " | ", gene_row$dominant_quadrant),
          transcriptAnnotation = "transcript",
          collapseTranscripts = "meta"
        )),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      
      track_list <- c(list(axis_track), bw_tracks, list(dmr_track, cgi_track, gene_track))
      track_list <- track_list[!sapply(track_list, is.null)]
      
      if(length(track_list) > 1) {
        # 所有代表位点汇总到一个 PDF，便于后续快速浏览和人工挑图。
        tryCatch({
          quiet_gviz_deprecations(plotTracks(
            track_list,
            from = view_start,
            to = view_end,
            chromosome = chr_use,
            main = paste0(gene_row$SYMBOL, " (", chr_use, ":", view_start, "-", view_end, ")")
          ))
        }, error = function(e) message("Locus plot failed for ", gene_row$SYMBOL, ": ", e$message))
      }
    }
    
    dev.off()
  } else {
    message("⚠️ 代表性位点均不在主染色体 (1-19/X/Y) 上，跳过轨道图绘制。")
  }
}
}, finally = {
  options(ucscChromosomeNames = old_ucsc_chromosome_names)
})
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2 BSseq 平滑甲基化可视化
# ==============================================================================
# 使用 bsseq 的 BSmooth() 提供平滑甲基化估计，
# 在区域可视化中比原始 CpG 点图更清晰。
message("⏳ 绘制 BSseq 平滑甲基化可视化...")

tryCatch({
if(requireNamespace("bsseq", quietly = TRUE) && exists("dmr_anno_df") && nrow(dmr_anno_df) > 0) {
  ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()

  # 构建 BSseq 对象 (如果不存在)
  if(!exists("bsobj_for_smooth") || is.null(bsobj_for_smooth)) {
    message("   构建 BSseq 对象用于平滑...")
    bs_data_list <- lapply(seq_along(obj.cpg), function(i) {
      raw_df <- methylKit::getData(obj.cpg[[i]])
      GRanges(
        seqnames = raw_df$chr,
        ranges = IRanges(start = raw_df$start, width = 1),
        M = raw_df$numCs,
        Cov = raw_df$coverage
      )
    })
    bsobj_for_smooth <- BSseq(
      chr = as.character(seqnames(bs_data_list[[1]])),
      pos = start(bs_data_list[[1]]),
      M = do.call(cbind, lapply(bs_data_list, function(gr) mcols(gr)$M)),
      Cov = do.call(cbind, lapply(bs_data_list, function(gr) mcols(gr)$Cov)),
      sampleNames = sample_ids
    )
  }

  # BSmooth 平滑 (只在数据量可管理时执行)
  bsobj_smooth <- tryCatch({
    message("   运行 BSmooth 平滑...")
    BSmooth(bsobj_for_smooth, ns = config$bsmooth_primary_ns, h = config$bsmooth_primary_h, parallelBy = "chromosome", mc.cores = 1, verbose = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("   BSmooth 失败: ", e$message, "，尝试较大窗口...")
    tryCatch({
      BSmooth(bsobj_for_smooth, ns = config$bsmooth_fallback_ns, h = config$bsmooth_fallback_h, parallelBy = "chromosome", mc.cores = 1, verbose = FALSE)
    }, error = function(e2) NULL)
  })

  if(!is.null(bsobj_smooth)) {
    # 选取 Top DMR 进行平滑可视化
    top_dmr_for_smooth <- dmr_anno_df %>%
      arrange(abs(diffMethy) > 0) %>%
      slice_head(n = 3)

    if(nrow(top_dmr_for_smooth) > 0) {
      for(idx in seq_len(nrow(top_dmr_for_smooth))) {
        dmr_row <- top_dmr_for_smooth[idx, ]
        chr_col <- if("seqnames" %in% colnames(dmr_row)) "seqnames" else "chr"
        dmr_chr <- as.character(dmr_row[[chr_col]])
        dmr_start <- dmr_row$start
        dmr_end <- dmr_row$end
        dmr_label <- ifelse(
          !is.na(dmr_row$SYMBOL) && dmr_row$SYMBOL != "",
          paste0(dmr_row$DMR_id, " (", dmr_row$SYMBOL, ")"),
          dmr_row$DMR_id
        )

        # 扩展区域用于可视化
        view_start <- max(1, dmr_start - config$browser_dmr_flank)
        view_end <- dmr_end + config$browser_dmr_flank

        # 提取该区域的平滑数据
        region_gr <- GRanges(seqnames = dmr_chr, ranges = IRanges(view_start, view_end))
        tryCatch({ seqlevelsStyle(region_gr) <- seqlevelsStyle(bsobj_smooth)[1] }, error = function(e) {})

        region_bs <- subsetByOverlaps(bsobj_smooth, region_gr)

        if(length(region_bs) > 0) {
          smooth_df <- data.frame(
            pos = start(region_bs),
            t(getMeth(region_bs, type = "smooth")) * 100
          )
          colnames(smooth_df) <- c("pos", sample_ids)

          smooth_long <- smooth_df %>%
            pivot_longer(cols = all_of(sample_ids), names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Smoothed_Meth") %>%
            left_join(tibble(Sample = sample_ids, Group = as.character(sample_group_factor(sample_ids, config))),
                      by = "Sample")

          p_smooth <- ggplot(smooth_long, aes(x = pos, y = Smoothed_Meth, color = Group, group = Sample)) +
            geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
            geom_vline(xintercept = c(dmr_start, dmr_end), linetype = "dashed",
                       color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_dark, 0.5)) +
            annotate("rect", xmin = dmr_start, xmax = dmr_end,
                     ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = unname(viz_pal$accent["yellow"]), alpha = 0.15) +
            scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$group) +
            labs(title = paste0("BSseq Smoothed: ", dmr_label),
                 subtitle = paste0(dmr_chr, ":", view_start, "-", view_end),
                 x = paste0("Position on ", dmr_chr),
                 y = "Smoothed Methylation (%)") +
            theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 12)

          ggsave(file.path("result/10_browser/plots/1", paste0("bsseq_smooth_", dmr_row$DMR_id, ".pdf")),
                 p_smooth, width = 10, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
}, error = function(e) {
  message("   BSseq 平滑可视化失败: ", e$message)
})
```
